name: Chicken Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat, then add the onions. Cook until transparent.
2. Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until most of the liquid has evaporated.
3. Stir in the chicken broth cube, flour, cream, milk, pepper, tarragon, and walnuts. Mix well to form a thick sauce.
4. Season with salt and pepper if needed. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent lumps.
5. Fill each crepe (8 total) with 1-2 tablespoons of the chicken mixture in the center.
6. Fold the crepes like a square envelope.
7. Place the folded crepes seam-side down in a buttered baking dish.
8. Pour any remaining cream over the top, then sprinkle with cheese.
9. Bake until bubbly and golden brown.
